mapper.select: SELECT c.COURSE_SN, c.CURRICULUM_ID, c.INSTR_USER_ID, c.COURSE_NM, c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN, c.OPNN_YN, c.SORT_ORD, c.REG_DT, cur.TITLE AS CURRICULUM_TITLE FROM COURSE c LEFT JOIN CURRICULUM cur ON c.CURRICULUM_ID = cur.CURRICULUM_ID WHERE c.INSTR_USER_ID = #{instrUserId} ORDER BY cur.TITLE NULLS LAST, c.SORT_ORD ASC, c.COURSE_SN ASC

SELECT COURSE_SN, CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, ATCH_FILE_ID, PROD_MTHD_CD, COURSE_PRICE, SORT_ORD, PREREQ_COURSE_SN, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM COURSE WHERE CURRICULUM_ID = #{curriculumId} ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC, REG_DT ASC

SELECT COURSE_SN, CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, COURSE_PRICE, SORT_ORD, RGTR_ID, LAST_MDFR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO COURSE ( CURRICULUM_ID, SUBJ_ID, INSTR_USER_ID, COURSE_NM, COURSE_EXPLN_CN, THMB_IMG, TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, OPNN_YN, PROD_MTHD_CD, COURSE_PRICE, SORT_ORD, PREREQ_COURSE_SN, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, MDFCN_DT ) VALUES ( #{curriculumId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{subjId, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
#{instrUserId}, #{courseNm}, #{courseExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thmbImg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totLrnTimeCnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), #{prodMthdCd, jdbcType=CHAR}, NVL(#{coursePrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), NVL(#{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0), #{prereqCourseSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{rgtrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{lastMdfrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE SET COURSE_NM = #{courseNm}, COURSE_EXPLN_CN = #{courseExplnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPNN_YN = #{opnnYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PREREQ_COURSE_SN = #{prereqCourseSn, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LECTURE WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE SET ATCH_FILE_ID = #{atchFileId} WHERE COURSE_SN = #{courseSn}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.COURSE_SN, c.COURSE_NM, c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN, c.THMB_IMG, c.COURSE_PRICE, c.OPNN_YN, c.PROD_MTHD_CD, c.TOT_LRN_TIME_CNT, c.REG_DT, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, s.SUBJ_NM AS SUBJ_NM, sc.SUBJ_CL_NM AS SUBJ_CL_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LECTURE l WHERE l.COURSE_SN = c.COURSE_SN) AS LECTURE_CNT FROM COURSE c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT s ON c.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON s.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID
ORDER BY c.SORT_ORD ASC, c.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURSE c JOIN MEMBER m ON c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT s ON c.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT_CLASSIFICATION sc ON s.SUBJ_CL_ID = sc.SUBJ_CL_ID

SELECT C.COURSE_SN AS courseSn, C.COURSE_NM AS title, C.COURSE_PRICE AS price, C.THMB_IMG AS thumbnailUrl, S.SUBJ_NM AS category, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM CL JOIN CLASSROOM_MEMBER CM ON CL.CLASS_SN = CM.CLASS_SN WHERE CL.COURSE_SN = C.COURSE_SN) AS studentCount FROM COURSE C INNER JOIN INSTRUCTOR I ON C.INSTR_USER_ID = I.INSTR_USER_ID LEFT JOIN SUBJECT S ON C.SUBJ_ID = S.SUBJ_ID WHERE I.INSTR_UUID = #{instrUuid} AND C.OPNN_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.SORT_ORD ASC, C.COURSE_SN ASC
SELECT SUBJ_ID, SUBJ_NM FROM SUBJECT WHERE SUBJ_CL_ID = #{subjClId} ORDER BY SUBJ_ID ASC

sql.trim:
AND c.OPNN_YN = 'Y'
and instr(m.user_name, #{paginationInfo.detailCondition.instructorName}) > 0
and instr(s.SUBJ_NM, #{paginationInfo.detailCondition.subjectName}) > 0
and instr(c.COURSE_NM, #{paginationInfo.detailCondition.courseName}) > 0

mapper.select: select c.COURSE_SN, c.COURSE_NM , s.SUBJ_NM, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, c.SUBJ_ID, c.COURSE_PRICE, c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN , CASE WHEN c.REG_DT >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_NEW , 1 AS IS_BEST from course c inner join subject s on c.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID inner join member m on c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID
select count(*) from course c inner join subject s on c.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID inner join member m on c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID

select c.COURSE_SN, c.COURSE_NM , s.SUBJ_NM, m.USER_NAME AS INSTR_USER_NM, c.SUBJ_ID, c.COURSE_PRICE, c.COURSE_EXPLN_CN , CASE WHEN c.REG_DT >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_NEW , 1 AS IS_BEST , i.INSTR_PROFILE_IMG from course c inner join subject s on c.SUBJ_ID = s.SUBJ_ID inner join member m on c.INSTR_USER_ID = m.USER_ID inner join instructor i on c.INSTR_USER_ID = i.INSTR_USER_ID where c.COURSE_SN = #{courseId}
